Created attachment 157184
libscrypt.diff

- Update to upstream version 1.20
- Quote variable in MAKE_ARGS
- Remove STACKPROTECTOR and STACKPROTECTORALL from OPTIONS
- Remove hash from GH_TAGNAME (use default) - thank you amdmi3@
